title: Debug assertion sqlite3VdbeMemAboutToChange: Assertion `(mFlags&MEM_Str)==0 || (pMem->n==pX->n && pMem->z==pX->z)' failed
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c0 INT, c1 VARCHAR(255), c2 DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0);
INSERT INTO t1(c0, c1) VALUES (NULL, 'test'), (1, 'example'), (2, NULL);
CREATE INDEX i1 ON t1(c1) WHERE c0 > 0;
UPDATE t1 SET c1 = '3.14' WHERE c0 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: UPDATE statement triggers assertion error in SQLite
